===================
===================
=== 2000.06.02 Cagliari (Schubert) rec info.txt
===================
===================
===================
June 2, 2000 Cagliari, Italy
Molo Ichnusa
- Capacity: 20,000 
Last show on the Eurpean Spring Tour 2000 before heading back to the US. 

Recording & sound mastering by Schubert
[sony tcd-d100  +  sony sbm1  /  neumann skm 140  /  neumann
bs48i-2 / maxell audio tape (44,1 khz)]

Received as aud cd-r. Extracted by EAC, then made FLAC files. No flaws.
Same recording as LB-1443 on losslessbob database. Excellent sound (quality 12/15 according to Atti); some brief spots of talking and singalong.


Disc 1 (56:40):

01 Announcement
02 Duncan And Brady (acoustic) 
03 My Back Pages (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 
04 Masters Of War (acoustic) 
05 Mama, You Been On My Mind (acoustic) 
06 Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic) 
07 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (acoustic) 
08 Country Pie 
09 This Wheel's On Fire 
10 All Along The Watchtower 
11 Just Like A Woman 

Disc 2 (59:12):

01 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp) 
02 Highway 61 Revisited 
(encore) 

03 Ballad Of A Thin Man 
04 Like A Rolling Stone 
05 Girl Of The North Country (acoustic) 
06 Maggie's Farm 
07 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 
08 Rainy Day Women #12 & #35 
09 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) 


Concert # 1209 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 19 of the 2000 Europe Spring Tour. 2000 concert # 44 
Concert # 114 with the 12th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), David Kemper (drums & percussion).

 
Enjoy the music!

-ts-
===================
